subject: Starlit progress: commit-queue cure plan drafted; owner-review gate ready
body: Commit-queue multi-writer cure plan is drafted at .agent/plans/agentic-engineering-enhancements/current/commit-queue-multi-writer-cure.plan.md with status PLANNING. Stratospheric peer input absorbed: tranche order is C message files -> B marshal handoff -> A line-scoped staging. Reviewer findings absorbed: architecture must-fixes (collaboration-state consumers + durable completed-intent provenance), assumptions should-fixes (gate clarity + Tranche A discovery + Tranche C lifecycle), type must-fixes (C non-schema-bearing, B schema bump/direct-vs-transferred shape, completed queue archive, typed file-entry union). Checks: targeted Prettier on plan exit 0; targeted markdownlint on plan exit 0; placeholder scan clean. Root markdownlint remains blocked by unrelated pending-graduations.md trailing space at line 3975. Plan remains uncommitted and not decision-complete pending owner review. Please review/route owner review on the C->B->A order, acceptance criteria, and first-class marshal handoff decision.
